---
title: "Contact"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

## Get in Touch

I am always interested in discussing research opportunities, collaborations, or answering questions about my work. Feel free to reach out!

### Curriculum Vitae

📄 **[Download My CV](files/CV_SiyuChen_v3.pdf)**

### Email

📧 **Primary:** [csiyu869@gmail.com](mailto:csiyu869@gmail.com)  
📧 **Secondary:** [26230324@njnu.edu.cn](mailto:26230324@njnu.edu.cn)

---

## Online Profiles

### Academic Profiles

- **Google Scholar:** [CHEN Siyu](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=05zqMBsAAAAJ&hl=en)
- **ORCID:** [0009-0007-3631-9389](https://orcid.org/0009-0007-3631-9389)
- **ResearchGate:** [Siyu Chen](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Siyu-Chen-210?ev=hdr_xprf)

### Code & Data

- **GitHub:** [@SiyuChen1111](https://github.com/SiyuChen1111)

---


*Last updated: March 2026*
